artifacts.source_command: manual: assemble EP-006 final M4 report from checked-in public evidence artifacts and milestone docs
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Authored final report; validation command verifies schema and redaction only.
notes: EP-006 final report links the public proof package and records the M5 compatibility hardening recommendation.

artifacts.source_command: manual: define EP-001 public artifact layout and redaction policy
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Authored policy document; Rust validation enforces the machine-readable subset.
notes: Policy version 1 rejects raw local artifacts and stale redaction checks.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- validate-m4-compatibility evidence/m4/compatibility-matrix.json
notes: Rows separate implementation status from Windows, Linux and macOS runtime measurement status.

artifacts.source_command: manual: render evidence/m4/compatibility-matrix.json into a reader-facing M4 compatibility table
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Authored Markdown rendering of the machine-readable compatibility matrix.
notes: Known gaps are visible in the table and are not converted into pass claims.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli --release -- m4-benchmark --output evidence/m4/m4-benchmark-summary.json
notes: Measures byte ingest, snapshot generation, replay and snapshot comparison on a deterministic synthetic workload.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli --release -- m4-memory-profile --output evidence/m4/m4-memory-profile.json
notes: Covers 10k, 100k and 1M logical-line scenarios with Hera-owned byte counters.

artifacts.source_command: manual: configure EP-003 baseline and memory thresholds
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Threshold policy is maintainer-authored; the report generator evaluates it against generated evidence.
notes: Latency metrics create baselines until accepted thresholds exist; memory metrics are hard-gated.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli --release -- m4-performance-report --bench evidence/m4/m4-benchmark-summary.json --memory evidence/m4/m4-memory-profile.json --thresholds evidence/m4/m4-performance-thresholds.json --json-output evidence/m4/m4-performance-report.json --markdown-output docs/m4-benchmarks-and-memory.md
notes: Creates the machine-readable EP-003 rollup and threshold evaluation.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli --release -- m4-performance-report --bench evidence/m4/m4-benchmark-summary.json --memory evidence/m4/m4-memory-profile.json --thresholds evidence/m4/m4-performance-thresholds.json --json-output evidence/m4/m4-performance-report.json --markdown-output docs/m4-benchmarks-and-memory.md
notes: Human-readable EP-003 benchmark, memory and threshold summary.

artifacts.source_command: manual: synthesize public replay fixture for EP-004 basic shell output
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Synthetic fixture is authored test data; replay verification is reproducible.
notes: Contains no local shell path, username or private transcript content.

artifacts.source_command: manual: synthesize public replay fixture for EP-004 resize and wrap behavior
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Synthetic fixture is authored test data; replay verification is reproducible.
notes: Normalized timing is excluded from deterministic snapshot hashing.

artifacts.source_command: manual: synthesize public replay fixture for EP-004 alternate screen behavior
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Synthetic fixture is authored test data; replay verification is reproducible.
notes: Covers public escape sequence replay without private TUI capture content.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- verify-m4-replay crates/terminal-fixtures/fixtures/m4-replay --json-output evidence/m4/m4-replay-verification.json
notes: Each public replay fixture replays twice with identical final snapshot bytes.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- export-m4-event-stream crates/terminal-fixtures/fixtures/m4-replay/basic-shell.json --output evidence/m4/replay-event-streams/basic-shell.jsonl
notes: Hera-specific JSONL stream with a versioned public header; not asciicast-compatible.

artifacts.source_command: manual: document EP-004 public replay proof and Paneflow shadow dogfood procedure
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Authored procedure document; commands and artifacts are separately reproducible.
notes: Documents raw local retention policy and zero-mismatch pass condition.

artifacts.source_command: cargo test --workspace
notes: Compiling example shows byte ingestion, resize and render snapshot without PTY or Paneflow dependencies.

artifacts.source_command: cargo test --workspace
notes: Compiling example shows PTY runtime ownership outside terminal-core and output forwarding into terminal state.

artifacts.source_command: manual: summarize EP-005 API examples, package readiness and OSS security baseline
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Authored reader-facing report; machine-readable evidence records command outcomes.
notes: Documents that package readiness is partial and that cargo publish is out of scope.

artifacts.source_command: manual API audit plus cargo test --workspace and cargo doc --workspace --no-deps
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Audit judgment is authored from checked commands and source evidence.
notes: Records no P0 boundary leak and open release blockers for package metadata and internal publish ordering.

artifacts.source_command: cargo doc --workspace --no-deps; cargo package -p <crate> --allow-dirty --no-verify
notes: Leaf crates package; dependent crates are blocked until internal crate registry names or publish order exist.

artifacts.source_command: cargo metadata --locked --no-deps --format-version 1; cargo tree --locked --duplicates; local binary and credential scans
notes: Internal local checks pass with gaps; external OpenSSF Scorecard is not measured because the CLI is unavailable.

artifacts.source_command: cargo check --workspace --features hera-dogfood; cargo test --workspace --features hera-dogfood; PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD=shadow cargo test -p paneflow-app --features hera-dogfood startup_token_checkpoint_compares_after_shadow_drain
notes: Records the EP-004 Paneflow feature gate and targeted shadow smoke with zero mismatch report files.

artifacts.source_command: PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD=shadow PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD_ARTIFACT_DIR=<paneflow-repo>/.paneflow-audit/hera-dogfood/m4-smoke-2026-07-04-ep001 PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD_RETENTION=scrubbed PANEFLOW_HERA_TERMINAL_ROOT=<hera-repo> cargo test -p paneflow-app --features hera-dogfood startup_token_checkpoint_compares_after_shadow_drain
notes: Local artifact directory is represented with a repo placeholder, not an absolute private path.
